document_info.document_type: Texas Department of Insurance Experience Rating Worksheet

business_description.nature_of_business: Hotel and restaurant hospitality operations, including hotel employees, bellhops, doorpersons, restaurant operations, and clerical office employees.

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy Number: WC-HCHP-2025-3350. Policy Period: 2025-05-01 to 2026-05-01. Final Experience Modification Factor: 0.94.

positives: Actual primary losses were 92945 compared to expected losses of 361806.
concerns: Prior loss history includes 16 claims across policy years 2021-2024.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Policy years 2021-2024 reported 16 total claims with total paid and total incurred losses of 92945. Losses by year: 2023-2024 had 2 claims and 9940 incurred; 2022-2023 had 6 claims and 26662 incurred; 2021-2022 had 8 claims and 56343 incurred. Actual primary losses were 92945 and actual excess losses were 0.
